title: Canada Workers Benefit Statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Workers Benefit Statistics
The Canada Workers Benefit (CWB) statistics present data based on the information that the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) collected and processed for all individual CWB recipients. The CWB replaces and strengthens the working income tax benefit (WITB). It is an enhanced and more accessible refundable tax credit. The data in the tables are taken from personal income tax returns that were processed for the tax year two years prior to the year of publication.
- 2024 Edition (2022 Tax Year)
- 2023 Edition (2021 Tax Year)
- 2022 Edition (2020 Tax Year)
- 2021 Edition (2019 Tax Year)
